rows.label: qev035405_MSG0001
rows.name:
I can't beat this thing...! I'll
make a tactical retreat for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035405_MSG0002
rows.name:
Heh... I've memorized your face, so very soon,
I'll definitely make you understand the crime
of making a fool out of the great Gus![ST:wait ]
